# Swim to Surf

## About
Swim to Surf provides private, one-on-one swimming lessons in American Fork, Utah. Instruction is safety-first and confidence-focused for infants, kids, teens, and adults.

## Services
- Private lessons (1:1)
- Infant lessons (15 minutes)
- Standard lessons (30 minutes)
- Weekly and monthly scheduling options based on instructor availability

## Service Area
- American Fork, Utah
- Utah County, Utah

## Contact
- Website: https://swimtosurf.com
- Email: swimtosurfemail@gmail.com
- Phone: 385-499-8036

## Key URLs
- Home: https://swimtosurf.com/
- Book: https://swimtosurf.com/book
- Instructors: https://swimtosurf.com/instructors
- FAQ: https://swimtosurf.com/faq
- About: https://swimtosurf.com/about
- Contact: https://swimtosurf.com/contact
- Sitemap: https://swimtosurf.com/sitemap.xml
- Full AI guide: https://swimtosurf.com/llms-full.txt

## Booking + Payment
- Bookings are confirmed by email with a confirmation code.
- Online checkout via Stripe (card / Apple Pay) is available.
- Pay-later options include Venmo, cash, and in-person payment.
